## Tags
settings, edit, cog, gear

## Categories
account

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/user-cog)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::UserCog;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        UserCog { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
